response.global_analysis: The video contains two musical performances. Song 1 is 'Ikite Eramai!' by Suou Patra (lyrics identified via audio/search as JSON was null). Song 2 is 'Quiet Night C.E.73' (JSON lyrics match audio but are incomplete; I transcribed the remaining verses). On-screen text for transitions and titles is also included. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal audio and visual cues.

subtitles.original: 全心宇宙です！
subtitles.english: It's a whole-hearted universe!

subtitles.original: 今何だだち 今こそ一致団結
subtitles.english: Now, pals! Now is the time for unity!

subtitles.original: パトラちゃん様に愛を込めて
subtitles.english: With love for Patra-chan-sama!

subtitles.original: バッキュン！
subtitles.english: Bakkyun!

subtitles.original: 生きてえらまい 今一期一会
subtitles.english: Living is great! This is a once-in-a-lifetime encounter.

subtitles.original: 満足10回なら 書きだそう どーれで
subtitles.english: If you're 10 times satisfied, let's write it down.

subtitles.original: 全開！ 抱いた 楽しい方でいいでしょ
subtitles.english: Full throttle! Just go with the fun side!

subtitles.original: いいでしょ！
subtitles.english: Is that okay?

subtitles.original: 生きてえらまい 生きちゃおうぜ
subtitles.english: Living is great! Let's just live!

subtitles.original: 勝手にはじめて 甘やかしちゃおう
subtitles.english: Start on your own and let's pamper you.

subtitles.original: 転んで 自信をなくさないで
subtitles.english: Don't lose your confidence when you fall.

subtitles.original: 戦おうぜ
subtitles.english: Let's fight!

subtitles.original: モンスターに負けないで
subtitles.english: Don't lose to the monsters.

subtitles.original: 自分の運命は
subtitles.english: Your own destiny...

subtitles.original: 自分で切り拓け
subtitles.english: ...carve it out yourself!

subtitles.original: 馬鹿言うほうが馬鹿
subtitles.english: The one who says "stupid" is the stupid one!

subtitles.original: セクシーでキュートで
subtitles.english: Sexy and cute...

subtitles.original: サイテー最高ぶりっ子
subtitles.english: ...the worst and best "burikko"!

subtitles.original: 健康的で文化的な 最低限度のボインボイン
subtitles.english: Healthy and cultural minimum "boin-boin"!

subtitles.original: It's My Life
subtitles.english: It's My Life

subtitles.original: むにむにむにむにハピみゅー
subtitles.english: Muni muni muni muni Hapi-myu!

subtitles.original: みんな、コメントで応援どうもありがとう！
subtitles.english: Everyone, thank you so much for the support in the comments!

subtitles.original: 見えてるよー！
subtitles.english: I can see you!

subtitles.original: おっ、パトラちゃん可愛いって打ってる？
subtitles.english: Oh, are you typing that Patra-chan is cute?

subtitles.original: ちょ、そこの君！サボってんじゃーないよ！
subtitles.english: Hey, you there! Don't slack off!

subtitles.original: 画面の向こう、見えてるぞー！
subtitles.english: I can see you on the other side of the screen!

subtitles.original: さあさあ、たくさんコメント打っていいー？
subtitles.english: Come on, can you type lots of comments?

subtitles.original: 笑いあげても気にすんな
subtitles.english: Don't mind even if I laugh.

subtitles.original: そのまま終わるより素晴らしいと
subtitles.english: It's more wonderful than ending just like that...

subtitles.original: 誇り
subtitles.english: ...with pride.

subtitles.original: お別れの約束を忘れんな
subtitles.english: Don't forget the promise of parting.

subtitles.original: 格好悪く生きろ
subtitles.english: Live un-coolly.

subtitles.original: 傷ついた思い出に
subtitles.english: To the hurt memories...

subtitles.original: 負けない気分になり
subtitles.english: ...feel like not losing!

subtitles.original: みんな、盛り上げてくれてどうもありがとう！
subtitles.english: Everyone, thank you so much for livening things up!

subtitles.original: この後は一緒に「パトラちゃん様」と言ってください！
subtitles.english: After this, please say "Patra-chan-sama" with me!

subtitles.original: せーの！
subtitles.english: Ready, go!

subtitles.original: パトラちゃん様！
subtitles.english: Patra-chan-sama!

subtitles.original: どうもありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: 生きてえらまい 今一期一会
subtitles.english: Living is great! This is a once-in-a-lifetime encounter.

subtitles.original: 満足10回なら 書きだそう どーれで
subtitles.english: If you're 10 times satisfied, let's write it down.

subtitles.english: Full throttle! Just go with the fun side!

subtitles.english: Don't lose your confidence when you fall.

subtitles.english: Let's fight!

subtitles.original: サイテー最高ぶりっ子

subtitles.original: It's My Life
subtitles.english: It's My Life

subtitles.original: むにむにむにむにハピみゅー
subtitles.english: Muni muni muni muni Hapi-myu!

subtitles.original: はい！ はい！ はい！ はい！ はい！ はい！
subtitles.english: Hai! Hai! Hai! Hai! Hai! Hai!

subtitles.original: もう一回！
subtitles.english: One more time!

subtitles.original: はい！ はい！ はい！ はい！ はい！ はい！
subtitles.english: Hai! Hai! Hai! Hai! Hai! Hai!

subtitles.original: 移動してるよ！ちょっと待ってね！
subtitles.english: I'm moving! Wait just a bit!

subtitles.original: Quiet Night C.E.73
subtitles.english: Quiet Night C.E.73

subtitles.original: はい！皆さん、ラクス・クラインです！
subtitles.english: Yes! Everyone, I'm Lacus Clyne!

subtitles.original: まだまだ生誕祭、盛り上げていってくださいね！
subtitles.english: Keep on livening up the birthday party!

subtitles.original: 静かな この夜に 貴方を待ってるの
subtitles.english: In this quiet night, I am waiting for you

subtitles.original: あのとき忘れた 微笑みを取りに来て
subtitles.english: Come to take the smile that I forgot back then

subtitles.original: あれから少しだけ 時間が過ぎて
subtitles.english: Since then, just a little time has passed

subtitles.original: 想い出が優しくなったね
subtitles.english: And memories have become gentle

subtitles.original: 星の降る場所で 貴方が笑っていることを
subtitles.english: I was always wishing that you were smiling...

subtitles.original: いつも願ってた
subtitles.english: ...in the place where stars fall

subtitles.original: 今 遠くても
subtitles.english: Even if now you are far away...

subtitles.original: また会えるよね
subtitles.english: ...we can meet again, right?

subtitles.original: いつか微笑みは こんなに儚くて
subtitles.english: One day, a smile became so fleeting...

subtitles.original: ひとつの間違いで 壊れてしまうから
subtitles.english: ...because it can be broken by a single mistake.

subtitles.original: 大切なものだけを 光に変えて
subtitles.english: Change only the precious things into light...

subtitles.original: 遠い空 越えて行く 強さだけ
subtitles.english: ...giving only the strength to cross the distant sky.
